reason: The remediation involves deleting user accounts. If an automated process or an administrator deletes a service account or a user currently being used for remote access (SSH) or application execution, it will cause immediate service disruption or loss of access. A human must verify the list of users before deletion.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Accidental deletion of service accounts; Accidental deletion of administrative/SSH accounts; Disruption of application dependencies relying on specific local users
